overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, tunnels, and intersections with heavy atmospheric rain effects and reflective wet roads, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: exits covered parking structure into open rainy street
accelerates onto main road from exit ramp

agents.ego_description: navigating out of a covered parking structure onto rain-slicked city streets, accelerating to join traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving ahead in the same direction, maintaining distance

entered.detail: large concrete parking garage with overhead red neon lighting and yellow striped markings on the ground
high-visibility yellow and black striped road markings indicating caution zone at structure exit
structural support column for the overhead parking structure
tall street lamps illuminating the rainy road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered concrete parking structure with distinctive yellow striped markings. The vehicle exits into a heavy downpour, transitioning from the sheltered artificial lighting to the open rainy street. A futuristic sedan is visible ahead as the camera vehicle accelerates onto the main road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with neon signage

events.description: passes other vehicles on the left while maintaining lane position
approaches large intersection with increasing building density and billboard visibility

agents.ego_description: cruising at steady speed along multi-lane highway, navigating through light traffic in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: futuristic car overtaking on the left side, headlights visible through rain

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade
large illuminated advertisement sign with bright neon colors visible through the rain
yellow and metal guardrail separating the highway lanes from the sidewalk
elevated highway or pedestrian bridge crossing overhead with structural supports

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wide multi-lane urban highway during a heavy downpour. Glass office towers and neon billboards line the street, their lights reflecting off the wet asphalt. The vehicle passes another car on the left while approaching an overpass structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with commercial plaza

events.description: navigates right turn at large intersection, following the road curvature
follows yellow van through commercial district, maintaining safe following distance

agents.ego_description: navigating through a large intersection and turning onto a commercial street, following a yellow van through the rain

notable_agents.action: yellow delivery van driving ahead, brake lights illuminating in the rain as it navigates the turn

entered.detail: massive illuminated screen displaying advertisements above the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet road surface
street-level shops with neon signage and illuminated storefronts
curved elevated highway ramp structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a large urban intersection with prominent crosswalk markings and a massive digital billboard overhead. After turning right, the scene shifts to a commercial street lined with neon-lit storefronts. A yellow van is followed through the turn, with scattered pedestrians visible on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel roadway with concrete walls

events.description: enters covered tunnel structure, transitioning from open rain to enclosed dry space
exits tunnel back into open rainy street, visibility changes with weather exposure

agents.ego_description: driving through a long concrete tunnel with artificial lighting, maintaining steady speed through the enclosed corridor

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead in the tunnel, taillights visible in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete archway marking the entrance to the covered tunnel section
smooth concrete walls with embedded lighting fixtures running along the tunnel length
directional signage mounted on the tunnel ceiling indicating routes
linear rows of overhead lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a long concrete tunnel, transitioning from the open rain to a dry, artificially lit enclosed space. The tunnel features smooth concrete walls with embedded lighting and overhead directional signs. After driving through the corridor, the vehicle exits back into the rainy night, with the tunnel entrance arch disappearing behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with concrete retaining wall and neon lighting

events.description: passes under intense neon light strips mounted on the retaining wall, creating color reflections on wet road
approaches intersection with visible crosswalk and pedestrians on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: cruising along street lined with a high concrete wall featuring neon lighting, approaching an intersection with pedestrians visible

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk next to the retaining wall, partially illuminated by neon lights

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running parallel to the road, covered in graffiti and neon lighting
horizontal strips of bright colored neon lights mounted on the retaining wall
urban art and graffiti covering sections of the concrete retaining wall
tall pole with traffic signs and street name indicators

segments.scene_description: Driving along a street bordered by a high concrete retaining wall adorned with vibrant neon light strips and graffiti. The wet road surface reflects the colorful neon lights. Pedestrians are visible walking along the sidewalk as the vehicle approaches an intersection with crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge with graffiti art walls

events.description: navigates slight curve on bridge while descending toward street level

agents.ego_description: crossing an elevated bridge structure with metal railings, descending toward the street level with graffiti-covered walls visible

entered.detail: elevated roadway with metal grate surface and structural supports
steel guardrails along the sides of the bridge deck
large concrete pillars supporting the bridge structure overhead
large colorful mural and graffiti art covering the wall adjacent to the bridge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle crossing an elevated bridge with metal railings and support columns. Large graffiti art murals cover the walls to the left. The bridge descends toward street level as the vehicle continues through the rainy cyberpunk cityscape, with urban buildings visible in the distance beyond the bridge exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a sheltered parking structure through a rain-drenched neon metropolis and into a subterranean tunnel before ascending onto an elevated bridge. It begins within a concrete parking area with yellow markings, moving out into a heavy downpour as the vehicle accelerates past a futuristic sedan onto a wide highway lined with glowing office towers. The scene then shifts through a large urban intersection under a massive digital billboard, turning right to follow a yellow van past neon-lit storefronts and pedestrians. As the vehicle enters a long, artificially lit concrete tunnel, the rain momentarily vanishes before the camera emerges back into the storm along a wall adorned with vibrant neon strips and graffiti. Finally, the path leads onto an elevated bridge with metal railings and large murals, descending back toward the street level as the rainy cityscape stretches into the distance.
